div.p: Edges show which prior word feeds each expanded word, and in which role. A change in W[0] propagates → W[16] → W[17] → W[18] → ...

W[0] (0x61626380) enters via the gray +W[t-16] edge at W[16]. W[16] then feeds W[18] via σ1 (orange), W[19] via the W[17]→W[19] σ1 chain, and so on. By W[21], W[0]'s influence has been mixed through σ1 five times, each application XORing three rotated/shifted perspectives of the value. By W[63], every word carries W[0]'s fingerprint.
